{

  "level_basis": {
    "textinspector_level_raw": null,

  "communicative_task_notes": [
    "Addresses the prompt directly.",
    "Provides 3 clear tips.",
    "Meets sentence count requirement."
  ],
  "grammar_score": 0.65,
  "corrections": [
    "i -> I (Register; A1; Low)",
    "simular -> similar (Lexis; B1; Low)",
    "Here is the tips -> Here are the tips (Grammar; A2; Medium)",
    "this apps -> these apps (Grammar; A2; Medium)",
    "time to TV -> time on TV (Grammar; B1; Medium)",
    "leave from -> leave (Grammar; B1; Medium)",
    "at VK -> on VK (Grammar; B1; Medium)",
    "enought -> enough (Lexis; B1; Low)",
    "I hope, my -> I hope my (Punctuation; B1; Low)",
    "write me at -> write me in (Grammar; B1; Medium)"
  ],
  "errors_by_category": {
    "Lexis": [
      {
        "excerpt": "simular",
        "correction": "similar",
        "comment": "Spelling error of common adjective.",
        "impact": "Low",
        "cefr_threshold": "B1"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "enought",
        "correction": "enough",
        "comment": "Spelling error of common adverb/adjective.",
        "impact": "Low",
        "cefr_threshold": "B1"
      }
    ],
    "Grammar": [
      {
        "excerpt": "Here is the tips",
        "correction": "Here are the tips",
        "comment": "Subject-verb agreement error (plural noun).",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "A2"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "this apps",
        "correction": "these apps",
        "comment": "Demonstrative pronoun agreement with plural noun.",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "A2"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "spend a lot of time to TV",
        "correction": "spend a lot of time on TV",
        "comment": "Incorrect preposition with verb 'spend'.",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "B1"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "leave from useless groups",
        "correction": "leave useless groups",
        "comment": "Unnecessary preposition 'from' with verb 'leave'.",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "B1"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "at VK",
        "correction": "on VK",
        "comment": "Incorrect preposition for social media platforms.",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "B1"
      },
      {
        "excerpt": "write me at personal messages",
        "correction": "write me in personal messages",
        "comment": "Incorrect preposition for communication channels.",
        "impact": "Medium",
        "cefr_threshold": "B1"
      }
    ],
    "Punctuation": [
      {
        "excerpt": "I hope, my",
        "correction": "I hope my",
        "comment": "Unnecessary comma between verb and object clause.",
        "impact": "Low",
        "cefr_threshold": "B1"
      }
    ],
    "Word order": [],
    "Sentence structure": [],
    "Text organization": [],
    "Discourse markers": [],
    "Rhetorical features": [],
    "Register": [
      {
        "excerpt": "i",
        "correction": "I",
        "comment": "Lowercase 'i' is incorrect in English.",
        "impact": "Low",
        "cefr_threshold": "A1"
      }
    ],
    "Incomprehensibility": []
  },
  "strengths": [
    {
      "item": "Clear logical structure (Problem -> Tips -> Closing)",
      "cefr_level": "B2",
      "category": "Rhetorical feature",
      "note": "Effective organization aids comprehension despite language errors."
    },
    {
      "item": "Use of specific vocabulary ('social media', 'personal messages')",
      "cefr_level": "B2",
      "category": "Vocabulary",
      "note": "Appropriate terminology for the context."
    }
  ],
  "feedback": "Level B1. Good task achievement with clear structure. Frequent basic errors in spelling, grammar (agreement, prepositions), and register (capitalization). Focus on proofreading and preposition usage.",
  "next_steps": [
    "Review subject-verb agreement.",
    "Practice prepositions with common verbs (spend time on).",
    "Proofread for capitalization and spelling."
  ]
}
